nodes.title: Generate Profit Loss Report
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/reports/profit-loss?dateFrom=YYYY-MM-DD&dateTo=YYYY-MM-DD with Authorization header. Returns {revenue, expenses, netProfit, details: [{accountName, amount}]}. Calculates from voucher and journal entry data.

nodes.title: Generate Account Statement
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/reports/account-statement/:accountId?dateFrom=YYYY-MM-DD&dateTo=YYYY-MM-DD with Authorization header. Returns {accountName, openingBalance, transactions: [{date, description, debit, credit, balance}], closingBalance}.

nodes.title: Generate Daily Summary
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/reports/daily-summary?date=YYYY-MM-DD with Authorization header. Returns {date, totalReceipts, totalPayments, totalTransfers, voucherCount, journalEntryCount}.

nodes.title: Generate Trial Balance
nodes.description: GET /api/businesses/:bizId/reports/trial-balance?date=YYYY-MM-DD with Authorization header. Returns array of {accountId, accountName, accountCode, debitBalance, creditBalance}. Total debits must equal total credits.
